title: Sarepta Therapeutics Q3 2024 Earnings Call Summary - Profitability and Strong ELEVIDYS Growth
text:
Sarepta reported strong Q3 2024 performance with total net product revenue of approximately $430 million, representing 39% growth year-over-year. The company achieved profitability on both GAAP and non-GAAP bases.

Key Revenue Breakdown: ELEVIDYS: $181 million (nearly 50% quarter-over-quarter growth). PMO franchise (EXONDYS 51, VYONDYS 53, AMONDYS 45): $249 million (4% growth).

Product Performance: The three-drug exon-skipping platform remains robust, with EXONDYS 51 leading at $140.7 million in Q3 revenue. The ELEVIDYS gene therapy exceeded guidance and analyst consensus. Management noted: Our ELEVIDYS performance substantially exceeded our prior guidance, as well as analyst consensus.

Pipeline Progress: Sarepta discontinued the SRP-5051 (PPMO) program due to persistent hypomagnesemia safety concerns, despite encouraging dystrophin expression results. SRP-9003 for LGMD Type 2E: BLA filing planned for 2025. SRP-9004 for LGMD Type 2D: Phase 1 initiation expected by year-end. SRP-9005 for LGMD Type 2C: Clinical trial planned for Q1 2025.

Forward Guidance: 2025 revenue target: $3 billion (approximately two-thirds from ELEVIDYS). Long-term peak sales projection: $5 billion+ across four approved therapies. Company expects to achieve sustainable profitability and positive cash flow in early 2025.
